title: Kick streamer Clavicular collapses mid stream after chokehold as viral video raises questions about live content limits
summary_full: Clavicular, also known as Braden Eric Peters, appeared to pass out after a chokehold during a Kick livestream on April 2, 2026. The viral clip raised safety concerns among viewers. The incident comes amid his recent arrests in Arizona and Florida, along with other controversies, including a viral Everglades video involving gunfire at an alligator.
